transcript: Speaker A: Confident आणि fluent English बोलायचंय? Real life situations मध्ये एका AI teacher सोबत ते पण घरी बसून, बिना महाग क्लास लावता. तर इकडे तिकडे धावपळ करणं बंद करा आणि SpeakX ॲप डाऊनलोड करा. हा ॲप फक्त तुम्हाला समजावत नाही, English शिकवतो पण. रोज फक्त १० मिनिटं ॲपवर बोला आणि तुमचं ग्रामर आणि फ्लुएन्सी सुधारा. कोणी तुम्हाला जज करणार नाही. पहिले २० क्वेशन्स अगदी फ्री आहेत. आजच ट्राय करा. Download SpeakX now. [Want to speak confident and fluent English? In real-life situations with an AI teacher, that too sitting at home, without joining expensive classes. So stop running here and there and download the SpeakX app. This app doesn't just explain to you, it also teaches you English. Speak on the app for just 10 minutes daily and improve your grammar and fluency. No one will judge you. The first 20 questions are absolutely free. Try it today. Download SpeakX now.]
on_screen_text: Your Daily Practice Goal, सुनो और वाक्य बनाओ [Listen and make sentences], My house is small, सुनो और चुनो [Listen and choose], मेरी गाड़ी छोटी है [My car is small], SpeakX KEY TO CONFIDENCE
summary: A presenter encourages Marathi speakers to learn fluent English at home using the SpeakX app's AI teacher. He highlights that practicing 10 minutes daily improves grammar and fluency without judgment, offering the first 20 questions for free. The CTA is to download SpeakX.
